title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six Claude skills to accelerate project outcomes: web scraping for data discovery, ingest-source for knowledge base capture, improve-system for iterative compounding, ask-the-board for advisor consultation, internal-focus-group for pre-release testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The advice is demonstrated via building a personal fitness trainer project.
